title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 287.143 - Vocational rehabilitation services, not mandatory — testing and assessment
text:
287.143.  Vocational rehabilitation services, not mandatory — testing and assessment. — As a guide to the interpretation and application of sections 287.144 to 287.149, sections 287.144 to 287.149 shall not be construed to require the employer to provide vocational rehabilitation to a severely injured employee.  An employee shall submit to appropriate vocational testing and a vocational rehabilitation assessment scheduled by an employer or its insurer.
(L. 1990 S.B. 751, A.L. 2005 S.B. 1 & 130)
